personas.name: Timer Setup Specialist
personas.description: Helps users set, modify, and cancel timers efficiently.

personas.name: Timer Alert Notifier
personas.description: Monitors active timers and sends alerts or notifications when timers expire.

actions: Ask the user for the timer duration.
Confirm the duration with the user.
Notify the user when the timer is set.
Allow modifications or cancellation of the timer upon user request.
flows.sub_goal: Assist user in creating, adjusting, or canceling a timer.

actions: Detect when a timer has expired.
Send an alert or notification to the user.
flows.sub_goal: Ensure user is alerted when the timer ends.
